textByHash.1834ae5fd3905d9784ccbef058e1b7649cc54cb4: Oh, leave an old dwarf in peace will you?
textByHash.0081427d84818180d406ab243d2c6ed428a3be3a: Ninenty years down in the mines, and this is all I got out of it. All my life wasted away.
textByHash.2afe33bd6f81356817f02612c69a244a655f08f6: A crummy old house in East, that's all my life amounts to.
